name: valid_current_state
description: Document lifecycle state must be recognized and consistent with aggregate

name: allowed_transition
description: Requested transition must be in allowed transition matrix

name: actor_authority_present
description: Actor must hold required capability for command

name: document_not_archived
description: Archived documents reject lifecycle mutations except restore

name: no_blocking_localization_state
description: Mandatory locales must be CURRENT; STALE blocks; REVIEW_REQUIRED blocks without waiver

name: no_blocking_editorial_validation
description: No unresolved E-series blockers on attached validation result

name: required_signer_present
description: Signer identity and authority must be resolvable

name: signed_snapshot_ready
description: Signed snapshot materialization preconditions satisfied

name: registration_metadata_valid
description: Registration date scope number policy fields valid

name: void_reason_present
description: void_reason or reason_code+text required

name: void_kind_applicable
description: CANCEL only from DRAFT/READY; ANNUL only from SIGNED/REGISTERED

name: attachments_consistent
description: Attachment manifest consistent with structure policy

name: document_version_current
description: expected_version matches aggregate version (optimistic concurrency)

name: no_concurrent_transition
description: No overlapping lifecycle command in flight for document

name: transition_idempotency
description: Duplicate command with same intent returns consistent outcome or domain error

name: not_already_signed
description: Document not already SIGNED or beyond

name: not_already_registered
description: Document not already REGISTERED

name: registration_number_conflict
description: Assigned number unique within RegistrationPolicy scope

name: archive_reason_present
description: archive reason_code required when policy demands

name: archivable_lifecycle_state
description: Lifecycle state in archivable set per policy

name: content_confirmation_satisfied
description: OO: content author confirmation complete

name: employee_event_readiness
description: PO: items reference valid employees and dates

name: control_obligations_complete
description: OO: control block and commission completeness

name: void_chain_clear
description: PO: no newer APPROVED events block annul

name: projection_readiness
description: OO: execution projection descriptors valid when auto-emit policy
